title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Cash & Carry Capital India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Metro Cash & Carry Capital India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Cash & Carry Capital India:
Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India!
